---
title: "Dongjun Wang"
image: "profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:wangdj935@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dongjun-wang-a479aa24b
---

Welcome to my website!

You can call me Tommy Wang. I graduated from Lehigh University majoring in Business Analytics. I am currently an MSBA student at University of California, San Diego.

**Email:** [wangdj935@gmail.com](mailto:wangdj935@gmail.com)

**Phone:** [(484) 719-3636](tel:+14847193636)
